title: Transcript:Sleeping Giants
wikitext:
{{Transcript|Quest}}
{{Transcript list|Kovac}}

==Starting out==
===Entering the cave before starting the quest===
* '''Player:''' I don't think I want to disturb a cave of giants right now...
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Kovac===
* '''Hill Giant:''' Wait...
* '''Hill Giant:''' Do not attack!
* '''Player:''' What the... You can talk?!
* '''Hill Giant:''' Do...
* '''Hill Giant:''' do not...
* '''Hill Giant:''' flig... fight.
* '''Player:''' You don't want to fight me?
* '''Hill Giant:''' Want...
* '''Hill Giant:''' no, need...
* '''Hill Giant:''' your help.
* '''Player:''' I must be dreaming. Giants can't talk!
* '''Hill Giant:''' Please...
* {{tselect|Start the Sleeping Giants quest?}}
* {{topt|Yes.}}
** '''Player:''' Okay giant, I'll help you out, but first you need to tell me your name... if you even have one.
** '''Kovac:''' Kovac.
** '''Player:''' Kovac... alright then. My name is [player name]. So, Kovac, what do you need help with?
** '''Kovac:''' Please...
** '''Kovac:''' follow in.
** '''Player:''' Hang on... is this a trick? Are you going to cook and eat me?!
** '''Kovac:''' No...
** '''Kovac:''' follow.
** {{qact|A cutscene plays, showing a workshop too big for regular-sized people to use.}}
** '''Player:''' Woah... What is this place?
** '''Player:''' Did you build this?
** '''Kovac:''' No...
** '''Kovac:''' Kovac...
** '''Kovac:''' accep... ancestor build.
** '''Player:''' Giants built this place?
** '''Kovac:''' Yes...
** '''Kovac:''' long ago.
** '''Player:''' How? Giants don't build, do they? I thought they were brutes...
** '''Kovac:''' Before...
** '''Kovac:''' giants differing.
** '''Kovac:''' Now...
** '''Kovac:''' not.
** '''Player:''' Huh? I don't understand what you mean.
** '''Kovac:''' Look.
** {{tbox|Kovac looks out to the tools around you.}}
** '''Kovac:''' Help fix.
** '''Player:''' You want me to help you by fixing those tools?
** '''Kovac:''' Yes.
** '''Player:''' Okay, I'll help, but first you need to tell me what this place was used for?
** '''Kovac:''' Make...
** '''Kovac:''' wheelpo... weapons.
** '''Player:''' Giants made weapons here?
** '''Player:''' That's incredible! But why do you want to make weapons? Most giants I've come across already have weapons?
** '''Kovac:''' Make...
** '''Kovac:''' giants...
** '''Kovac:''' remember.
** '''Player:''' Remember what?
** '''Kovac:''' Giants...
** '''Kovac:''' not just...
** '''Kovac:''' killers.
** '''Kovac:''' Kovac want...
** '''Kovac:''' help giants remember.
** '''Player:''' I see. To be honest, if I hadn't seen this place myself, I wouldn't have believed you.
** '''Player:''' Alright, Kovac, I'll help you out. What do we need to do first?
** '''Kovac:''' We fix tools...
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|No.}}
** '''Player:''' No way! I'm getting out of here. There's no chance I'd trust a giant!
** '''Hill Giant:''' Please...
** '''Hill Giant:''' help.
** {{tact|end}}

==What is this? A workshop for giants?==
===Talking to Kovac===
* '''Player:''' What's left to fix, Kovac?
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' Trip hammer...
* '''Kovac:''' Grindstone...
* '''Kovac:''' Polishing wheel...
* '''Player:''' Thanks!
* {{tact|end}}

===Inspecting objects===
====Big chest====
* '''Player:''' Kovac, where did you get this chest from?
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' ...
* '''Kovac:''' chest store stuff.
* {{tbox|Kovac shrugs...}}
* '''Player:''' Alright then...
* {{tact|end}}

====Crate====
* '''Player:''' What do you keep in this box?
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' stuff.
* '''Player:''' Very insightful...
* {{tact|end}}

====Crucible====
* '''Player:''' What is this, Kovac?
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' look like big bucket.
* '''Player:''' I can see that, but what's it used for?
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' maybe we put things in.
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac need think about it more.
* {{tact|end}}

====Lava pool====
* '''Player:''' Having all this lava here without a barrier is quite dangerous.
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac agree.
* '''Player:''' Should we try building something to keep us safe?
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' no.
* '''Player:''' Why not?
* '''Kovac:''' Just no swim in the hot juice.
* {{tact|end}}

====Mould jig====
* '''Player:''' What is this table used for, Kovac?
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' look like we put thing on it.
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac not sure what yet.
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac think about it more.
* {{tact|end}}

====Preform storage====
* '''Player:''' This looks a little dangerous. Quite a perilous place to store something.
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' good place to cook food.
* '''Kovac:''' Hot meat very good.
* {{tact|end}}

====Waterfall====
* '''Player:''' Not everyday you see a waterfall in a cave.
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac drink from waterfall...
* '''Kovac:''' Hydration impote... importent.
* '''Player:''' I agree, it's very important.
* {{tact|end}}

===Reparing the trip hammer===
* '''Player:''' I think this has seen better days. What was it?
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' big hammer.
* '''Player:''' Right... and what did it do?
* '''Kovac:''' Hit things.
* '''Player:''' Very perceptive, Kovac.
* '''Player:''' Let me take a look and see if I can fix it.
* {{tselect|Repair the trip hammer?}}
* {{topt|Yes.}}
** {{tcond|If the player does not have the materials required:}}
*** {{tbox|pic=Oak logs detail.png|pic2=Bronze nails detail.png|You will need an oak log, 5 nails and a hammer to repair the trip hammer.}}
*** {{tact|end}}
** '''Player:''' That looks like it'll do the trick. What do you think?
** '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
** '''Kovac:''' that look right.
** '''Player:''' What's it supposed to do?
** {{tbox|Kovac takes a long look at the trip hammer... }}
** {{tbox|...}}
** '''Kovac:''' Kovac think Kovac figure it out.
** '''Player:''' Go on.
** '''Kovac:''' Trip hammer power by water...
** '''Kovac:''' Water spin wheel and raise hammer.
** '''Kovac:''' Hammer fall and crump sword into shape.
** '''Player:''' That makes sense. Quite resourceful for giants to make something water powered.
** '''Kovac:''' Mhm...
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|No.}}
** {{tact|end}}

===Reparing the grindstone===
* '''Player:''' What was this meant to be?
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac think it was for grinnin... grinding.
* '''Player:''' I see. It looks like it's lost its teeth.
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac conquer.
* '''Player:''' Conquer? It's already broken! Hitting it more won't help.
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac agree.
* '''Player:''' Right... now we're agreed, I'll see what I can do to fix it.
* {{tselect|Repair the grindstone?}}
* {{topt|Yes.}}
** {{tact|The player begins to fix the grindstone.}}
** '''Player:''' Well that required a bit of elbow grease. It should be good to go now.
** '''Kovac:''' Thank you small one...
** '''Player:''' Didn't want to try and help me?
** '''Kovac:''' Kovac did not know how...
** '''Kovac:''' Kovac beggin... beginning to understand.
** '''Player:''' Can you tell me what this is used for then?
** {{tbox|Kovac takes a long look at the grindstone... }}
** {{tbox|...}}
** '''Kovac:''' Grindstone important...
** '''Kovac:''' We grind sword against stone...
** '''Kovac:''' make sword sharp.
** '''Player:''' So we use it when making swords?
** '''Kovac:''' Yes.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|No.}}
** {{tact|end}}

===Reparing the polishing wheel===
* '''Player:''' Okay, what is this thing? It just looks like a wheel to me.
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* {{tbox|Kovac ponders your question... }}
* {{tbox|...}}
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac think he know.
* '''Player:''' And?
* '''Kovac:''' This polishing wheel...
* '''Kovac:''' make thing shiny.
* '''Player:''' Looks like it's lost its soft edge then.
* {{tselect|Repair the polishing wheel?}}
* {{topt|Yes.}}
** {{tcond|If the player does not have the materials required:}}
*** {{tbox|pic=Wool detail.png|pic2=Oak logs detail.png|You will need some wool, 2 oak logs, 5 nails and a hammer to repair the polishing wheel.}}
*** {{tact|end}}
** '''Player:''' Not my finest work, but I think it will do.
** '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
** '''Kovac:''' Kovac agree.
** '''Player:''' So when would we use the polishing wheel?
** '''Kovac:''' Polishing sword impotan... important.
** '''Kovac:''' Create perfect killing edge...
** '''Kovac:''' very good for sword.
** '''Player:''' That makes sense.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|No.}}
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Kovac after all the tools are repaired===
* '''Player:''' That's all the tools repaired. Well... as best as I can do.
* '''Kovac:''' Yes...
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac begin to understand more now.
* '''Player:''' I've noticed your speech has been improving over time as well.
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac know what say...
* '''Kovac:''' but sometime hard say proppel... properly.
* '''Player:''' That's alright, we'll figure it out together.
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac agree. Ready to make sword?
* '''Player:''' Yes! I'm itching to get started.
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac get few things ready first...
* '''Kovac:''' then we can start.
* {{tact|end}}

==Make-A-Sword==
===Talking to Kovac===
* '''Player:''' Okay Kovac, I think I'm ready to make a sword.
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac feel like things look correct...
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac think you are right.
* '''Player:''' So what do I need to do to make a sword?
* '''Kovac:''' First...
* '''Kovac:''' you will need a coliti... commission.
* '''Player:''' Where can I get one of those?
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac will supply them...
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac already gotten one from old friend.
* '''Player:''' Okay, so what do I need to make?
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac need a {{Colour|#ef1020|Flat Broad}} sword.
* '''Player:''' Great!
* '''Player:''' How do I make that?
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac think we need to fill the...
* '''Kovac:''' how's it called...
* '''Kovac:''' the big stone bucket...
* '''Player:''' Oh, you mean a crucible?
* '''Kovac:''' Yes, thank you...
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac think we need to fill the crucible with metal first.
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac has been connecti... collecting metals...
* '''Kovac:''' They're in that box-crate by entry.
* '''Kovac:''' Use bars and weapons...
* '''Kovac:''' Crucible can take both.
* '''Kovac:''' Load metals into crucible until it looks full.
* '''Kovac:''' While you do that...
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac think about next thing we need to do.
* {{tact|end}}

===Searching crate===
* {{tbox|You rummage through the box... }}
* {{tbox|You find a bunch of metal bars and old weapons!}}
* {{tcond|If the player does not have 20 open inventory spaces:}}
** {{tbox|You will need 20 free inventory slots to take the items from the crate.}}
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tselect|Take the items?}}
* {{topt|Yes.}}
** {{tbox|pic=Bronze battleaxe detail.png|pic2=Iron bar detail.png|You take a selection of bars and weapons from the crate.}}
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|No.}}
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Kovac after looting the crate===
* '''Player:''' Alright, I've got the metal you said to take from the box. What now?
* '''Kovac:''' You will need to fill the crucible...    
* '''Kovac:''' Add metals, armour or weapon you find to fill it.
* '''Kovac:''' We stick to bronze and iron for this sword...  
* '''Kovac:''' We keep the first sword simple.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Kovac after partially filling the crucible===
* '''Player:''' I've added a few things to the crucible. Is that enough?
* '''Kovac:''' No, we need more...
* '''Kovac:''' 28 metal bars worth. Weapon and armour can go into crucible too but some metal lost when melted down.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Kovac after filling the crucible===
* '''Player:''' Right, that's the crucible full. Can I make the sword yet?
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac think we need to set up a mould.
* '''Player:''' What's a mould used for?
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac think mould will determine the type of sword to be made.
* '''Kovac:''' Remember, we need a {{Colour|#ef1020|Flat Broad}} sword.
* '''Player:''' Okay, so how do I go about setting up a mould?
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac remember being told a sword is made from three parts...
* '''Kovac:''' a forte, a blade and a tip.
* '''Kovac:''' Use mould jig behind you...
* '''Kovac:''' You can select part for each selecti... section.
* '''Kovac:''' Each mould part is differing...
* '''Kovac:''' They will suit different commissions better...
* '''Kovac:''' Look for parts that match commission.
* '''Player:''' Right... I think I'm with you.
* '''Kovac:''' If you are still confused...
* '''Kovac:''' come back to me.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Kovac before setting the mould===
* '''Player:''' I'm sorry Kovac, but I'm not entirely sure what I'm meant to be doing.
* '''Kovac:''' That is okay...
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac not so sure of himself...
* '''Kovac:''' but you help Kovac, so Kovac help you.
* '''Player:''' Thanks Kovac. You're gentle for a giant.
* '''Player:''' So what was it I needed to do at the mould jig?
* '''Kovac:''' We need to fill each part of the mould...
* '''Kovac:''' Forte, blade and tip.
* '''Kovac:''' We want to use mould parts that match collisi... commission Kovac give you.
* '''Kovac:''' Remember, each part suit a differing sword better...
* '''Kovac:''' Look for ones that match {{Colour|#ef1020|Flat and Broad}}.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Kovac after setting the mould===
* '''Player:''' Right, the mould is setup and the crucible is full to the brim. We must be ready to pour.
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' let me look.
* {{tbox|Kovac takes a look at what you've done... }}
* {{tbox|...}}
* '''Kovac:''' Yes, all things look correct...
* '''Kovac:''' Well done little one. We are ready.
* '''Kovac:''' Pour the metal from the crucible into the mould...
* '''Kovac:''' then take out the preform.
* '''Kovac:''' Once you have done that...
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac will tell how to work the preform.
* {{tact|end}}

===Before picking up the preform===
* '''Player:''' The metal's too hot to pick up!
* '''Kovac:''' Yes.
* '''Player:''' What do I do?
* '''Kovac:''' Cool it down...  
* '''Kovac:''' What do you expect?
* '''Player:''' Ah, of course... How do I do that?
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac do not know. Try pouring water on it.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talk to Kovac after using a bucket of water===
* '''Player:''' I'm not sure what to do next...
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...    
* '''Kovac:''' take the preform and put it in your hand. Then come see Kovac for help.
* {{tact|end}}

===Trying to pick up the preform before cooling it===
* {{tbox|The preform is still molten! You need to cool it down.}}

===Trying to pick up the preform with a weapon or shield equipped===
* {{tbox|You must free your hands so you can hold the preform.}}

===After picking up the preform===
* '''Player:''' Okay Kovac, I've got this huge burning hot sword. What do I do with it?
* '''Kovac:''' Now for fun part.
* '''Kovac:''' Use tools around the foundry to reclin... refine the preform.
* '''Player:''' How do I know which tool I need to use?
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac not too sure. Kovac's gut feeling says use trip hammer first.
* {{tbox|Progress on your sword can be tracked via the display on screen. You can track which tool you need to use via the completion bar.}}
* '''Kovac:''' This is very impoten... important...
* '''Kovac:''' The preform needs to be within a certain heat range to work properly.
* '''Kovac:''' If you use the wrong tool...
* '''Kovac:''' or tool at wrong heat, we damage the preform quality.
* '''Kovac:''' A sword with low quality is bad...
* '''Kovac:''' Means less giants will want it, so Kovac give less for it.
* '''Kovac:''' If you damage a preform too much, it will become junk and Kovac will have to throw it away...
* '''Kovac:''' but this first attent... attempt, so do not worry about quality too much.
* '''Kovac:''' You use trip hammer first. Trip hammer need preform to be quite hot.
* {{tbox|The temperature of the preform is tracked via the temperature bar.}}
* {{tbox|To work a preform with a tool, the temperature needs to be within the matched temperature range, or you'll damage the preform.}}
* {{tbox|Any damage to the preform will lower its quality, tracked via the quality bar. If there's no quality left in the preform it becomes unworkable, and must be throw away.}}
* '''Kovac:''' If the preform at wrong temperature...
* '''Kovac:''' You can hot it up by dunking it in lava or cold it by holding it to waterfall.
* '''Player:''' Alright, I'll give it a go.
* '''Kovac:''' Remember, try trip hammer first with hot preform.
* {{tact|end}}

===Before completing the use of the trip hammer===
* '''Player:''' I'm not sure which tool I need to use next.
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm... you need to use the trip hammer.
* '''Kovac:''' Make sure preform is nice and hot...
* '''Kovac:''' Trip hammer needs a high temperature.
* {{tact|end}}

===Using a preform that is too cold on the trip hammer===
* '''Kovac:''' Stop!
* '''Player:''' What did I do wrong?
* '''Kovac:''' You're damaging the preform!
* '''Player:''' How?
* '''Kovac:''' The sword is too cold. We need to heat it up to use it on the trip hammer.
* '''Player:''' Oh, my bad!
* {{tact|end}}

===Using a preform on the trip hammer after its been hammered enough===
* '''Kovac:''' Stop!
* '''Player:''' What did I do wrong?
* '''Kovac:''' You're damaging the preform!
* '''Player:''' How?
* '''Kovac:''' Using wrong tool. We should be using the grindstone.
* '''Player:''' Oh, my bad!
* {{tact|end}}

===Using a preform that has not been completely hammered on the grindstone or polishing wheel===
* '''Kovac:''' Stop!
* '''Player:''' What did I do wrong?
* '''Kovac:''' You're damaging the preform!
* '''Player:''' How?
* '''Kovac:''' Using wrong tool. We should be using the trip hammer.
* '''Player:''' Oh, my bad!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to him after hammering the preform enough===
* '''Player:''' I'm not sure which tool I need to use next.
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' time to move over to the grindstone.
* '''Kovac:''' The preform need to be warm...
* '''Kovac:''' Fictio... friction from grindstone will heat the preform up as well.
* {{tact|end}}

===Using a preform that is too hot on the grindstone===
* '''Kovac:''' Stop!
* '''Player:''' What did I do wrong?
* '''Kovac:''' You're damaging the preform!
* '''Player:''' How?
* '''Kovac:''' The sword is too hot. We need to cool it down to use it on the grindstone.
* '''Player:''' Oh, my bad!
* {{tact|end}}

===Using a preform that is too cold on the grindstone===
* '''Kovac:''' Stop!
* '''Player:''' What did I do wrong?
* '''Kovac:''' You're damaging the preform!
* '''Player:''' How?
* '''Kovac:''' The sword is too cold. We need to heat it up to use it on the grindstone.
* '''Player:''' Oh, my bad!
* {{tact|end}}

===Using a preform on the grindstone after its been ground enough===
* '''Kovac:''' Stop!
* '''Player:''' What did I do wrong?
* '''Kovac:''' You're damaging the preform!
* '''Player:''' How?
* '''Kovac:''' Using wrong tool. We should be using the polishing wheel.
* '''Player:''' Oh, my bad!
* {{tact|end}}

===Using a preform that has not been completely ground on the grindstone on the polishing wheel===
* '''Kovac:''' Stop!
* '''Player:''' What did I do wrong?
* '''Kovac:''' You're damaging the preform!
* '''Player:''' How?
* '''Kovac:''' Using wrong tool. We should be using the grindstone.
* '''Player:''' Oh, my bad!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to him after hammering the preform enough===
* '''Player:''' I'm not sure which tool I need to use next.
* '''Kovac:''' You are almost done...
* '''Kovac:''' You just need to use polishing wheel to finish preform off.
* '''Kovac:''' Preform need to be quite cool to work with polishing wheel.
* {{tact|end}}

===Using a preform that is too hot on the polishing wheel===
* '''Kovac:''' Stop!
* '''Player:''' What did I do wrong?
* '''Kovac:''' You're damaging the preform!
* '''Player:''' How?
* '''Kovac:''' The sword is too hot. We need to cool it down to use it on the polishing wheel.
* '''Player:''' Oh, my bad!
* {{tact|end}}

===Using a preform that is too cold on the polishing wheel===
* '''Kovac:''' Stop!
* '''Player:''' What did I do wrong?
* '''Kovac:''' You're damaging the preform!
* '''Player:''' How?
* '''Kovac:''' The sword is too cold. We need to heat it up to use it on the polishing wheel.
* '''Player:''' Oh, my bad!
* {{tact|end}}

===After polishing it enough===
* '''Player:''' Looks like the sword is finished. I should take it to Kovac.
* {{tact|end}}

===Using the finished sword on any tool after its finished===
* '''Player:''' Looks like the sword is finished. I should take it to Kovac.
* {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to fill the crucible before handing in the preform===
* '''Player:''' I should finish helping Kovac before I try making another sword.
* {{tact|end}}

===Handing in the sword===
* '''Player:''' Okay Kovac, I think I've finally finished the sword!
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' let Kovac look.
* {{tbox|You pass the sword over to Kovac... }}
* {{tbox|He analyses your work...}}
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' Yes...
* '''Kovac:''' Hmm...
* '''Kovac:''' This is defeanin... definitely a sword...
* '''Kovac:''' Well done little one.
* {{tcond|If the quality of the sword is at 0:}}
** '''Player:''' Sorry it's not very good. I'm still getting use{{sic}} to everything.
** '''Kovac:''' That is okay. You do better than Kovac could...
** '''Kovac:''' We still leanin... learning.
** '''Player:''' So what do we do with it now?
** {{tact|continues}}
* {{tcond|If the quality of the sword is above 0:}}
** '''Player:''' Great! So what do we do with it now?
** {{tact|continues}}
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac take care of it.
* '''Player:''' Out of curiosity, who is this first blade for?
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac friend...
* '''Kovac:''' Obor.
* {{tcond|If the player has 0 Obor kill count:}}
** '''Player:''' Obor? Can't say I've heard of them.
** {{tact|continues}}
* {{tcond|If the player has at least 1 Obor kill count:}}
** '''Player:''' Obor? He's just going to use it to kill me!
** '''Kovac:''' Obor good friend. Kovac know he only attack if you trespass his cave...
** '''Kovac:''' Maybe you should have some manners and knock first.
** '''Player:''' Well, you're not wrong there... I normally just let myself in.
** '''Kovac:''' Yes, manner very important.
** {{tact|continues}}
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac think Obor show other giants how strong our swords are. Then every giant want one.
* '''Player:''' That's a pretty clever marketing plan, I must admit.
* '''Kovac:''' Kovac know what he do sometime... Thank you for help, [player name]. You free to use foundry whenever you want.
* {{Qact|Congratulations! Quest complete!}}
